metadata_information.title: Macro prudential policies from a micro prudential angle
metadata_information.version: Python script, from D&R API, generated on 2026-03-19

title_statement.title: Macro prudential policies from a micro prudential angle

document_description.abstract: The standard macro(prudential) models focus on externalities and treat all prudential instruments as alternative, but equivalent, forms of Pigouvian taxes. This paper explicitly models individual banks' risk choices and shows that different prudential instruments affect banks' risk-taking incentives differently. Thus, conflicts may arise between the micro and macro prudential stance.
